actions.shotDescription: A woman stands on a street corner in Tokyo, smiling and pointing upwards.

actions.text: how to SPEND TWO DAYS in TOKYO, 🇯🇵 Japan
this is how to spend two days in Tokyo

actions.shotDescription: POV shot walking through a crowded market street.
Close-up of a chef's hands preparing tuna nigiri sushi.

actions.text: so day one start off with Tsukiji Market

actions.shotDescription: The woman holds a plate of tuna donburi and smiles at the camera.

actions.text: you'll find the freshest sushi and ramen here

actions.shotDescription: A long queue of people waiting outside a restaurant under an awning.
Wide shot of a city street in Ginza with cars and a crosswalk.

actions.text: go early because there will be long lines

actions.shotDescription: Night shot of a modern building with 'EDITION' signage, a taxi drives by.

actions.text: after that walk about seven minutes to Ginza

actions.shotDescription: Interior of a dimly lit, luxurious hotel bar with white armchairs.

actions.text: it's also the place I'd recommend finding accommodation in

actions.shotDescription: Daytime wide shot of a Ginza street with a Coach store.

actions.text: this is such a relaxing and clean place

actions.shotDescription: Interior of a luxury store with red walls and Christmas-themed displays.

actions.text: it's known for their luxury shopping

actions.shotDescription: Wide shot of the iconic entrance arch to Takeshita Street in Harajuku.
A display case filled with various colorful crepe models.

actions.text: after that head to Harajuku and explore Takashita Street for trendy fashion and snacks

actions.shotDescription: Close-up of a hand holding a strawberry and cream crepe.

actions.text: like this crepe I'm holding

actions.shotDescription: POV shot walking through a very crowded street in Harajuku.
Wide shot of a tree-lined shopping street in Harajuku.

actions.text: if Ginza is not to your liking you can also shop here as well

actions.shotDescription: Night shot of a busy, neon-lit street crossing in Shinjuku.

actions.text: there are tons of stores

actions.shotDescription: POV walking down a narrow, crowded street in Shinjuku with many vertical neon signs.

actions.text: you're gonna wanna explore Kabukicho

actions.shotDescription: Low-angle shot looking up at a string of glowing orange lanterns in a narrow alley.

actions.text: this is Tokyo's entertainment and red light district

actions.shotDescription: The woman walks away from the camera down a narrow, beautifully lit alley.

actions.text: it's also one of the greatest places to end your night with dinner and drinks

actions.shotDescription: A hand inserts money into a ramen ticket vending machine.
Close-up of chopsticks dipping ramen noodles into a thick broth.

actions.text: now for day two

actions.shotDescription: A scenic wide shot of the Imperial Palace East Gardens with a bridge over the water.

actions.text: take a tour or stroll around Imperial Palace East gardens

actions.shotDescription: A wide shot of a grassy area with manicured trees, with modern buildings in the background.
A low-angle shot of the red Tokyo Tower framed between two modern buildings.

actions.text: we actually found this really cool spot to take pictures from

actions.shotDescription: A very low-angle shot of Tokyo Tower against a clear sky.
A man leans down to look at snacks on a shelf in a Japanese convenience store.

actions.text: but do make sure to visit a Family Mart or 7-11 if you're coming from the states

actions.shotDescription: The man examines pre-packaged meals in the refrigerated section of the convenience store.

actions.text: it will blow your mind

actions.shotDescription: Night shot of an elevated highway with a large 'ROPPONGI' sign.

actions.text: after that explore Roppongi hills for shopping and dining

actions.shotDescription: A distorted, wide-angle, sped-up shot of Shibuya Crossing at night.

actions.text: and end the night experiencing the iconic Shibuya Crossing and center streets

actions.shotDescription: POV shot walking through a crowded street in Shibuya at night.
A close-up shot of a bowl of dipping noodles (tsukemen).

actions.text: another dipping noodle meal

actions.shotDescription: A man in a red cap slurps noodles from a bowl.

actions.text: that's what I would recommend for a two day trip to Tokyo

actions.shotDescription: Wide shot of the famous 3D calico cat billboard in Shinjuku at night.

actions.text: so if you guys want a longer itinerary comment down below
if you have any other questions or comments feel free to leave them down below as well!

audiovisual.subtitleStyle: White sans-serif text with black outline or semi-transparent background box.
audiovisual.colorGrade: Bright and vibrant with natural colors.

structure.openingShot: Creator on a Tokyo street introducing the topic.
structure.cta: Comment for a longer itinerary or with questions.
